title: holcus annuus subsp. annuus
intro: Holcus annuus subsp. annuus, also known as annual brome or wild brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Holcus annuus subsp. annuus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
